# checkpointsase_application (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) The application host address.
- `name` (String) The application name.
- `network` (String) The network ID to associate with this application.
- `port` (Number) The application port number.
- `type` (String) The application type. Supported values: 'http', 'https', 'rdp'.

### Optional

- `groups` (List of String) List of group IDs allowed to access this application.
- `users` (List of String) List of user IDs allowed to access this application.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
